_comment: The /ingest/* rewrites use `:path(.*)` — NOT `:path*`. Vercel's `:path*` matcher does not match URLs ending in '/', which silently breaks proxying of every PostHog SDK beacon (the SDK hardcodes trailing slashes: /ingest/e/, /ingest/decide/, /ingest/i/v0/e/, /ingest/batch/). Failing URLs fall through to the SPA catch-all and serve index.html → POSTs return 405. A post-deploy smoke test at .github/workflows/posthog-proxy-smoke.yml guards against regression. If restructuring: keep the named-regex form, or update the smoke test accordingly.
